role: full observation may be sufficient but not minimal: composing out the intermediate stage (observing only the endpoints) reaches the same recoverable verdict as observing every stage

count_objects.pt_object: full pointwise relaxation Pt(y)=product_k F_k(y_k) over the full 3-stage context
count_objects.lift_object: transition-compatible subset Lift(y) of Pt(y), computed for both the full and the thinned (endpoints-only) context
count_objects.feature_object: image of Pt(y) and Lift(y) under the terminal-state feature map
